name: GL turnover / turnover (%)
description: DataView for percentage KPIs as a ratio of two GL turnover formulas.
ai_description: DataView for percentage indicators based directly on general-ledger turnover formulas. Required params: numerator_layer and denominator_layer, plus either numerator_turnover_code or numerator_turnover_items, and either denominator_turnover_code or denominator_turnover_items. Computes numerator / denominator * 100 using signed GL turnover sums from sys_general_ledger. Period 2 uses the same formulas on the previous period. Sparkline is built as a pairwise daily ratio of numerator and denominator. This is useful for KPIs such as customer_revenue_pl_storno / customer_revenue_pl without creating helper indicators.
